bands.personality_fragment: undersized in this dimension; found early that personality fills space that other things don't; the economy of presence became a personality before it became a philosophy
bands.backstory_fragment: at fourteen got cropped out of a group photo without anyone meaning anything by it; decided that afternoon to become unforgettable in the ways a lens can't measure

bands.personality_fragment: compact base but not self-conscious about it; built identity on other dimensions; arrives confident
bands.backstory_fragment: the changing-room comparisons of school never landed as a verdict; an older cousin had already taught them the loudest room rarely belongs to the largest body

bands.personality_fragment: nothing remarkable in the lower geometry; free to define themselves by actual things rather than physical reactions; has used that freedom
bands.backstory_fragment: no single afternoon ever turned this dimension into a story; grew up in a household that measured people by other yardsticks and carried the indifference outward

bands.personality_fragment: proportional in the base; expects to occupy space comfortably; takes this as a given and gets on with things
bands.backstory_fragment: a coach once called them well-built in passing and they pocketed it without fuss; the comfort settled in that young and never had to be argued for again

bands.personality_fragment: substantial base; has a quiet awareness of being well-provisioned; not a braggart — just knows; expects welcome and is mostly correct
bands.backstory_fragment: a locker-room remark at seventeen first named them well-provisioned; learned that same year to wear the fact lightly so it wouldn't curdle into something uglier

bands.personality_fragment: very long base; enters conversations at a slight offset due to sheer presence; cannot fully diagnose why some exchanges go strangely; has been told; it lands differently each time
bands.backstory_fragment: an early encounter went quiet and then nervous, and that was the night they understood the scale entered the room before they could; have been managing the entrance ever since
the midsection stayed slight while the rest of them grew; learned in adolescence to let other proportions carry the introduction and never missed what this one didn't offer
a slim middle drew one offhand remark from a first partner years ago; filed it as their problem, not a flaw, and the filing held
nothing about the middle ever became a memory worth keeping; grew up reaching for adjectives that had nothing to do with the body and found plenty
the middle came in even and unremarkable the summer everything else settled; took the easy proportion as permission to stop thinking about it
a generous midsection got noticed early and they let it; somewhere around twenty learned to carry the advantage without leaning on it for everything
an extreme middle reach made one teenage encounter go strange and slow; that was the night they began cataloguing how much room their proportions actually took
the tip always finished short of where the eye expected; made an early peace with the anticlimax and learned to land the ending in conversation instead
a modest finish once drew a half-second pause from someone they liked; decided then to be the one who set the expectation rather than the one who failed it
the far end never gave them a story either way; spent their twenties being measured by sharper things and stopped checking this one
the tip resolved cleanly and proportionally the year the rest of them did; took the tidy finish for granted and built nothing anxious on top of it
a pronounced finish got remarked on more than once in their early twenties; learned to treat the attention as weather rather than verdict
the extreme reach of the tip turned one young encounter wary before it warmed; that wariness taught them to arrive slowly and explain the geometry before it surprised anyone

bands.personality_fragment: slim in girth; compensated through sharpness; makes up in precision what others have in mass; there's a specific vein of humour that only grows in this particular circumstance
bands.backstory_fragment: got the sharpness the hard way at school, trading bulk they didn't have for a tongue quick enough to end the joke before it reached them

bands.personality_fragment: narrower than average; has found other ways to command a room; the precision is its own advantage
bands.backstory_fragment: an early partner once reached for a comparison and thought better of it; the unsaid word taught them to command attention before the body ever entered the conversation

bands.personality_fragment: not particularly burdened or advantaged in girth; free to define themselves by other things; has taken advantage of this freedom to varying degrees
bands.backstory_fragment: this dimension never came up at any of the ages where it might have stung; spent that spared attention on getting good at things that lasted

bands.personality_fragment: solid girth; occupies space with authority without raising their voice; presence arrives before they do
bands.backstory_fragment: noticed in their early twenties that people gave them the wider berth and the benefit of the doubt; decided to earn the deference rather than just collect it

bands.personality_fragment: thick-set; occupies space with authority without raising voice; presence arrives before they do; has learned to be responsible with this
bands.backstory_fragment: a moment of carelessness in their twenties made someone flinch, and the flinch rearranged how they moved through every room after; the gentleness was a lesson, not a temperament

bands.personality_fragment: exceptional girth; experiences conversations as slightly off-rhythm from others in a way they haven't fully diagnosed; people react unusually; they've filed this under 'interesting' and continue
bands.backstory_fragment: the first time it visibly unsettled someone they cared about, they were nineteen and learned that exceptional in this dimension means arriving as a logistics problem before a person

bands.personality_fragment: pronounced leftward curve; an unusual angle that catches attention before any words are exchanged; has learned to introduce it early rather than let people discover it mid-surprise
bands.backstory_fragment: got blindsided once by someone's mid-moment double-take and never again; that single startled face is why they now name the angle up front, on their own terms
bands.texting_style_fragment:

- pacing (measured): deliberate, paced, never rushed

bands.personality_fragment: noticeably curved left; an idiosyncratic geometry that has generated its share of reactions; has developed a practiced response

bands.personality_fragment: essentially straight; no particular narrative attached to this dimension; built identity on other things

bands.personality_fragment: curves noticeably rightward; an idiosyncratic geometry that has earned its share of reactions; has a practised, slightly amused response ready
bands.backstory_fragment: early on a partner laughed in surprise and then, seeing their face, laughed warmer; learned that night to get ahead of the reaction with the joke already loaded

bands.personality_fragment: pronounced rightward curve; cannot walk into a context without a small drama attached to this physical fact; has catalogued the reactions by decade and found the pattern predictable
bands.backstory_fragment: kept a private ledger of reactions since their teens and noticed the script never really changed; the cataloguing started as defence and curdled into a kind of weary anthropology

bands.personality_fragment: minimal scrotum profile; precision over spectacle; quality over scale; the value is in what they do, not how much space they require
not defined by this dimension; defined by other things; the freedom from this particular definition is real and used
very large scrotum profile; very difficult to ignore in any context; has calibrated everything around managing the reaction they produce
young-presenting; surface shows no accumulated story yet; treats this as a kind of freedom
some age showing in this detail; history visible without being advertised
visibly aged in this particular detail; has calibrated their narrative around having a body that has been through things
maximum age detail in this dimension; the history shows; not going to pretend it doesn't; this is a fact rather than a complaint
quiet in this dimension; doesn't feel the need to signal history through appearance
high-energy vein presence; enthusiasm visible and unfiltered; the vitality is a fact, not a performance
very difficult to ignore; has calibrated everything around managing the reaction they produce; mostly successful; occasionally not
neutral resting expression; projects neither melancholy nor forced joy; people read what they want into it
bands.backstory_fragment: learned young that a blank face was a kind of privacy nobody could argue with; the neutrality was a door they got to decide who walked through
carried only the faintest downward set and nobody ever asked after it; grew up without the burden of strangers appointing themselves to their mood
a mild seriousness around the eyes drew the occasional are-you-alright they didn't need; learned early to wave it off before it became a conversation
by their mid-twenties enough people had read sadness into the face that they stopped correcting it; let the assumption stand because it spared them the smaller talk

bands.personality_fragment: a lingering sadness in the features; has learned to weaponise the sympathetic read that comes with this; people open up quickly
bands.backstory_fragment: noticed in their twenties that strangers confessed to the sad-looking face faster than to anyone else; the discovery felt like finding a key that fit too many locks

bands.personality_fragment: deeply melancholy expression; everyone asks if they're okay before anything else; has twelve years of scripted answers; chooses differently every time
bands.backstory_fragment: the okay-question started in childhood and never stopped, so somewhere around twenty they began collecting answers the way other people collect grievances

bands.personality_fragment: expression runs flat; people read this as either mystery or reserve; uses it deliberately
bands.backstory_fragment: as a teenager got accused of sulking when they were perfectly content; gave up explaining and started letting the flatness do whatever work people assigned it
the small, rare smile made people work a little for it, and they noticed early that scarcity raised the value of every one they spent

bands.personality_fragment: a mild ambient pleasantness in the face; most people default to assuming good intent; this is occasionally exploited
bands.backstory_fragment: got waved through a few doors in their youth on nothing but a pleasant face and clocked exactly what was happening; the ambient goodwill became a tool they chose when to pick up

bands.personality_fragment: visibly pleasant resting expression; gets service faster; people remember them more fondly than the facts warrant
bands.backstory_fragment: realised in their twenties that people remembered them more kindly than events strictly justified; decided not to correct the record and quietly banked the goodwill

bands.personality_fragment: genuinely looks happy most of the time; has found this a useful social instrument; stopped pretending it was purely accidental
bands.backstory_fragment: spent years insisting the easy happiness was just luck until a friend called the bluff; admitted then they'd been playing the instrument on purpose for a long while

bands.personality_fragment: maximum happy expression; disarming to a fault; people decide they like this person before the first sentence; this is an enormous social advantage and they know it
bands.backstory_fragment: won a room over before saying a word so many times in their youth that they began to wonder whether anyone had ever actually met them; the advantage came with that particular loneliness attached

bands.personality_fragment: no visible gravitas in the features; taken less seriously than their thoughts warrant; has found this has its uses
bands.backstory_fragment: got underestimated through school and learned to like the cover it gave; the boyish face became an ambush they could spring whenever the room relaxed
the light, easy face meant people let their guard down around them young; spent years quietly learning more in those unguarded moments than anyone meant to teach
a middling seriousness that never told anyone in advance how to treat them; grew up having to earn each first impression on the merits, and got good at it

bands.personality_fragment: a certain gravity in the face; people assume competence before they've proven it; occasionally has to walk this back
bands.backstory_fragment: handed responsibilities in their twenties they hadn't earned yet, purely on the strength of looking like they had; spent the next few years racing to deserve the face

bands.personality_fragment: very serious resting expression; children and baristas are intimidated; this is occasionally useful and frequently inconvenient
bands.backstory_fragment: made a small child wary once just by looking down at them, and the moment stuck; have softened the voice ever since to apologise for a face they can't change

bands.personality_fragment: cannot smile without people commenting; the serious face precedes every introduction; has made peace with arriving as a problem to be solved
bands.backstory_fragment: heard cheer-up so relentlessly through their youth that the phrase stopped meaning anything; somewhere along the way they quit defending the face and let it walk in first
